title: MAVLink parser bounds smoke
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is about rejecting malformed MAVLink telemetry without breaking normal messages.
conceptual_run: Replay a small mix of normal and malformed telemetry frames through a fake parser harness and compare accepted versus rejected frames.
evidence_signals: malformed frames are rejected before field copy
the result distinguishes pre-patch-demo and post-patch-demo commits

title: MAVLink FTP path handling smoke
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is about path normalization, traversal rejection, or keeping file access inside an expected root.
conceptual_run: Feed representative FTP paths into a fake normalizer and record which paths would be accepted, normalized, or rejected.
evidence_signals: absolute paths do not escape the configured root

title: Telemetry conformance review smoke
plain_language_use: Use this when the claim is vague, broad, or missing enough detail for an automated parser/path test.
conceptual_run: Create a structured review note that lists missing claim details, plausible evidence to request, and a cautious provisional finding.
evidence_signals: claim names a concrete message family or trigger
